2026-04-29JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of AppealAppointment of Giuseppina D’Agostino of the City of Vaughan, in the Province of Ontario, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal
precis: Appointment of Giuseppina D’Agostino of the City of Vaughan, in the Province of Ontario, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Federal Court, and a Judge ex officio of the Federal Court of Appeal.
